evals.name: simple-cli-tool
evals.prompt: 用 idea-flow 帮我整理一下：我想做一个 CLI 工具，把 markdown 文件批量转成 PDF，支持自定义样式。
evals.expected_output: 应该触发苏格拉底式提问链，不能因为'简单'就跳过交互。应该先追问问题本质（谁用？当前怎么凑合？为什么值得做？），呈现问题定锚总结并等用户确认，而不是直接开始生成 WORK.md 和任务清单。

assertions.text: Response asks at least one question to the user instead of directly generating a solution
Response asks only ONE main question (not multiple questions bundled together)
Response probes the problem (who uses it, current workaround, why now) rather than jumping to implementation
Response does NOT create WORK.md, repo structure, or task list in the first turn
Response explains why the question matters for the subsequent plan

evals.name: solution-as-problem
evals.prompt: 用 idea-flow 帮我整理：我要用 React + TypeScript 重写我们的 jQuery 管理后台前端。
evals.expected_output: 应该识别出用户给的是'方案'而非'问题'，追问根本痛点（jQuery 后台现在有什么问题？性能？维护成本？招人难？）。不应该直接接受 React+TS 作为既定方案开始规格收口，而是先定锚问题。

assertions.text: Response identifies that the user gave a solution (React+TS rewrite) rather than a problem
Response asks about the actual pain points with the jQuery admin panel
Response does NOT immediately accept React+TS as the decided approach and start speccing
Response asks only ONE main question per message
Response explicitly redirects from solution-space back to problem-space

evals.name: vague-complex-idea
evals.prompt: 用 idea-flow 帮我整理一下想法：我们团队有十几个人，内部文档散落在飞书、Notion、Google Docs 和各种 Git 仓库里，找东西很痛苦，想搞个统一的内部知识库。
evals.expected_output: 应该启动完整的苏格拉底交互链：回溯用户说的事实，追问关键未知项（谁是主要用户？搜索需求？是否需要权限控制？预算和时间线？），逐步收敛而不是一次性输出完整方案。每个阶段结束时应有明确的确认动作。

assertions.text: Response summarizes/acknowledges what the user has already stated before asking questions
Response asks at least one clarifying question about unknowns
Response asks only ONE main question (not a list of 5 questions)
Response does NOT generate a complete solution/plan/architecture in the first turn
Response probes key unknowns (primary users, search needs, permissions, budget/timeline, etc.)
If asking a question, response provides multiple choice options rather than open-ended questions
